sql: SELECT * FROM users AS u1 ORDER BY u1.email
SELECT * FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.posted_at >= DATETIME('now', '-22 days')
SELECT l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at >= DATETIME('now', '-21 days') ORDER BY l1.liked_at
SELECT u1.email FROM users AS u1
SELECT u1.is_verified, u1.country_code, u1.username, u1.email FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.is_verified = 0
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1
SELECT p1.content, p1.user_id, p1.posted_at, p1.id FROM posts AS p1 ORDER BY p1.id
SELECT p1.view_count, p1.id, p1.posted_at FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.posted_at > DATETIME('now', '-30 days')
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at <= DATETIME('now', '-13 days')
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id > 97 ORDER BY l1.liked_at
SELECT p1.view_count, p1.content, p1.id, p1.user_id FROM posts AS p1
SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at >= DATETIME('now', '-9 days') ORDER BY f1.follower_id

SELECT c1.user_id, c1.post_id, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1
SELECT f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followee_id > 332 ORDER BY f1.follower_id LIMIT 69
SELECT p1.view_count, p1.posted_at, p1.id, p1.content FROM posts AS p1 LIMIT 98
SELECT c1.comment_text, c1.user_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.comment_text <> '123' ORDER BY c1.post_id
SELECT l1.post_id, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1
SELECT * FROM users AS u1
SELECT c3.created_at, c3.id, p1.view_count, c3.user_id FROM posts AS p1 INNER JOIN comments AS c3 ON p1.id = c3.post_id
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u2 ON f1.follower_id = u2.id
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 FULL JOIN posts AS p6 ON u1.id = p6.user_id
SELECT c1.post_id, c1.id, u5.is_verified, u5.email FROM comments AS c1 INNER JOIN users AS u5 ON c1.user_id = u5.id
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 INNER JOIN posts AS p5 ON c1.post_id = p5.id WHERE p5.content LIKE '%a%'

SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 INNER JOIN users AS u8 ON f1.follower_id = u8.id WHERE u8.is_verified = 1

SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 FULL JOIN posts AS p1 ON c1.post_id = p1.id

SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 INNER JOIN users AS u5 ON c1.user_id = u5.id

SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 LEFT JOIN users AS u5 ON f1.follower_id = u5.id
SELECT c1.user_id, c1.id, p8.posted_at, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1 INNER JOIN posts AS p8 ON c1.post_id = p8.id WHERE p8.id < 83
SELECT u6.is_verified, u6.country_code, l1.user_id, u6.email FROM likes AS l1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u6 ON l1.user_id = u6.id WHERE u6.id >= 213
SELECT c2.post_id, p1.view_count, p1.content, c2.comment_text FROM posts AS p1 INNER JOIN comments AS c2 ON p1.id = c2.post_id WHERE c2.user_id < 635
SELECT p3.id, p3.user_id, p3.content, p3.view_count FROM users AS u1 LEFT JOIN posts AS p3 ON u1.id = p3.user_id
SELECT c1.id AS comment1, c2.id AS comment2, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 JOIN comments AS c2 ON c1.post_id = c2.post_id AND c1.id <> c2.id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users AS inner_users WHERE inner_users.signup_date <= DATETIME('now', '-27 days')) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.id <> 285
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM comments AS inner_comments WHERE inner_comments.post_id <> 247) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.user_id = 709
SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.id = f1.follower_id AND sub_u.is_verified = 0)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM posts AS inner_posts WHERE inner_posts.id = 258) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id IN (SELECT sub_f.follower_id FROM follows AS sub_f WHERE sub_f.follower_id <> 729)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM posts AS inner_posts WHERE inner_posts.view_count <> 395) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM likes AS inner_likes WHERE inner_likes.post_id >= 307) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.post_id < 599
SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id
SELECT p1.user_id, p1.id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.id IN (SELECT sub_c.post_id FROM comments AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.id >= 990)
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM follows AS sub_f WHERE sub_f.follower_id = u1.id AND sub_f.followed_at < DATETIME('now', '-12 days'))
SELECT l1.user_id, l1.post_id, l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM posts AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.id = l1.post_id AND sub_p.user_id >= 829)
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id IN (SELECT sub_p.id FROM posts AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.posted_at >= DATETIME('now', '-15 days'))
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id IN (SELECT sub_l.user_id FROM likes AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.post_id > 900)
SELECT * FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.user_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-1 days'))
SELECT p1.user_id, p1.posted_at FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.user_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.country_code LIKE 'b%')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users AS inner_users WHERE inner_users.id <> 230) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-5 days')
SELECT c1.id AS comment1, c2.id AS comment2, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 JOIN comments AS c2 ON c1.post_id = c2.post_id AND c1.id <> c2.id
SELECT u1.id FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id IN (SELECT sub_l.user_id FROM likes AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.liked_at >= DATETIME('now', '-4 days'))

SELECT p1.view_count, p1.id, p1.content FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.user_id > 180 UNION SELECT p2.view_count, p2.id, p2.content FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.user_id <> 606

SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at > DATETIME('now', '-4 days') UNION SELECT f2.followed_at, f2.followee_id, f2.follower_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.follower_id >= 661
SELECT l1.post_id, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at < DATETIME('now', '-11 days') UNION ALL SELECT l2.post_id, l2.user_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id <> 971

SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followee_id = 536 UNION ALL SELECT f2.follower_id, f2.followee_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followee_id <= 244 ORDER BY follower_id LIMIT 21

SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at <= DATETIME('now', '-17 days') UNION SELECT f2.followee_id, f2.followed_at FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followed_at > DATETIME('now', '-29 days')

SELECT c1.id, c1.created_at, c1.user_id, c1.comment_text FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id <> 498 UNION SELECT c2.id, c2.created_at, c2.user_id, c2.comment_text FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.post_id > 539

SELECT u1.signup_date, u1.is_verified, u1.username FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.email <> 'user42@example.com' UNION SELECT u2.signup_date, u2.is_verified, u2.username FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.country_code = 'admin'
SELECT p1.user_id, p1.id, p1.view_count FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.view_count > 459 UNION SELECT p2.user_id, p2.id, p2.view_count FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.view_count > 946 LIMIT 33

SELECT u1.country_code, u1.id, u1.username, u1.is_verified FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.signup_date < DATETIME('now', '-2 days') UNION SELECT u2.country_code, u2.id, u2.username, u2.is_verified FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.email <> 'user72@example.com'

SELECT c1.user_id, c1.id, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.id = 367 UNION SELECT c2.user_id, c2.id, c2.post_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.created_at > DATETIME('now', '-21 days') ORDER BY user_id

SELECT l1.user_id, l1.post_id, l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id = 609 UNION ALL SELECT l2.user_id, l2.post_id, l2.liked_at FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.liked_at < DATETIME('now', '-30 days') LIMIT 20
SELECT p1.id, p1.user_id, p1.content FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.content LIKE '%c' UNION SELECT p2.id, p2.user_id, p2.content FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.content LIKE '%a%' ORDER BY id

SELECT p1.view_count, p1.user_id, p1.posted_at, p1.id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.posted_at > DATETIME('now', '-14 days') UNION SELECT p2.view_count, p2.user_id, p2.posted_at, p2.id FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.user_id > 42 ORDER BY view_count LIMIT 37
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id <> 784 UNION ALL SELECT l2.liked_at, l2.user_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id = 870 ORDER BY liked_at LIMIT 34
SELECT c1.id, c1.comment_text, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id <> 74 UNION SELECT c2.id, c2.comment_text, c2.created_at FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.post_id <= 501
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id >= 474 UNION ALL SELECT l2.liked_at, l2.user_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.liked_at > DATETIME('now', '-9 days') LIMIT 50
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at < DATETIME('now', '-2 days') UNION SELECT l2.liked_at, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.post_id = 35 ORDER BY liked_at LIMIT 45

SELECT c1.post_id, c1.user_id, c1.id, c1.comment_text FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.user_id = 472 UNION SELECT c2.post_id, c2.user_id, c2.id, c2.comment_text FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.post_id = 580 ORDER BY post_id LIMIT 30

SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followed_at, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.follower_id < 594 UNION SELECT f2.follower_id, f2.followed_at, f2.followee_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followee_id > 434

SELECT c1.id, c1.comment_text, c1.user_id, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.comment_text LIKE 'b%' UNION ALL SELECT c2.id, c2.comment_text, c2.user_id, c2.created_at FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.created_at < DATETIME('now', '-22 days') LIMIT 14
